testCases: TC1: basic valid input, net positive (cost > savings)
TC2: high lines, low savings, team plan
TC3: zero dailyLines → validation error
TC4: negative hoursSaved → validation error
TC5: invalid tool name
TC6: isTeam not boolean (string)
TC7: dailyLines NaN
TC8: dailyLines Infinity
TC9: hoursSaved string "10" should be accepted if convertible? We'll require number type. So error: "hoursSaved must be a valid number" if string.
TC10: missing param4 → error
TC11: all edge, high lines, free tool, team, large savings
TC12: exactly included lines limit
TC13: hoursSaved = 0, net positive
TC14: large numbers, team plan, high overage
TC15: dailyLines negative → error
TC16: hoursSaved missing → error
TC17: tool as empty string → error
TC18: valid tool with uppercase → should we accept case-insensitive? We'll accept case-insensitive by converting to lowercase. So "GitHub-Copilot" works.
TC19: hoursSaved non-integer (floating) allowed: 2.5 hours → savings = 2.5 * 4 * 50 = 500.
TC20: very high dailyLines that overflows? Use finite check.
TC21: isTeam true, tool with zero base price (free) - ensure multiplier does nothing.
TC22: validation returns multiple errors at once.
